{{Quote|Prepare to engage. Full forward.|[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ivan Cronus]]|<ref name="Darksaber" />}}
The '''Battle of the Chaardan Shipyards''' was a battle that took place during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the first such engagement since [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]] had unified various [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]]-controlled territories into the [[United Warlord Fleets]].

==Background==
In order to distract the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] from her preparations for the attack on the [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], Daala ordered [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ivan Cronus|Cronus]] to assume control of [[Crimson Command]], a fleet of one hundred and twelve [[Victory II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory II''-class Star Destroyers]] and use the warships to engage in terror raids against targets of opportunity.

==The battle==
After striking several [[Planet/Legends|worlds]], including [[Khomm/Legends|Khomm]], the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Dorsk 81]], Cronus attacked the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet's]] [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] at [[Chardaan Shipyards|Chardaan]]. As it happened, this was the one location where any sort of resistance was put up against the rampaging [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]]. Although Cronus utterly obliterated the shipyards and their surrounding infrastructure, it came at the cost of two of his own vessels.

==Aftermath==
Leaving the chaos and destruction that had been wrought at Chardaan behind, Crimson Command went on to attack several more New Republic-aligned planets, including [[Porus Vida]]. Cronus then split his fleet, sending twenty of his ''Victory''-class Destroyers to link up with Daala's force at [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin Prime's]] fourth [[Moon/Legends|moon]], with the remainder continuing their scattered raiding. Of all the attacks carried out by Cronus, Chardaan remained the only one where a battle could be said to have taken place.

==Appearances==
*[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] {{1st}}
